zh.lifeSummary: 當Joanna Bagge於大約1581年出生在英國薩默塞特哈德時，她的父親Thomas Bagge22歲，母親Botilla Von Zijlen21歲。她於1603年5月12日與Thomas Strong在英國戴文哈德斯托可結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和8個女兒的父母。她去世於1657年8月26日在英國英格蘭多瑟特哈德斯托可享年77歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭多瑟特哈德斯托可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joanna Bagge于大约1581年出生在英国薩默塞特哈德时，她的父亲Thomas Bagge22岁，母亲Botilla Von Zijlen21岁。她于1603年5月12日与Thomas Strong在英国戴文哈德斯托可结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和8个女儿的父母。她去世于1657年8月26日在英国英格兰多瑟特哈德斯托可享年77岁，埋葬在英国英格兰多瑟特哈德斯托可。

nameMeanings.name: Bagge
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Norfolk, Suffolk, and Middlesex): variant of   Bagg  .

variants.name: Bagg
meanings: from Middle English bagge ‘bag, pack, bundle’, hence a metonymic occupational name for a maker of bags and sacks of various kinds, including wallets and purses. It might also have been used for a beggar, or for one who carried their belongings in a bag.
from the ancient Germanic personal name Bago (Bac(c)o, Bahho), from the root bag- ‘to fight’ (see Bacon 2).

variants.name: Badger
meanings: habitational name from a place in Shropshire named Badger, probably from an unattested Old English personal name Bæcg + Old English ofer ‘ridge’.

occupational name for a maker of bags (see Bagge 1) or from Middle English badger ‘hawker, huckster’, though this word is not recorded before 1467–8 and it is of doubtful origin. It is unlikely that the surname has anything to do with the animal (see Brock 2), which was not known by this name until the 16th century.

nameMeanings.name: Joanna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin form, Io(h)anna, of Greek Iōanna, the feminine equivalent of Iōannēs ( see John ). In the New Testament, this name is borne by a woman who was one of Jesus's followers (Luke 8:3; 24:10). She was the wife of the steward of the household of King Herod Antipas. The name was regularly used throughout the Middle Ages in most parts of Europe as a feminine equivalent of John , but in England it has only been in common use as a vernacular given name since the 19th century. Celebrated British bearers of the name include the novelist Joanna Trollope ( b. 1943 ), the actress Joanna Lumley ( b. 1946 ), and the concert pianist Joanna McGregor ( b. 1959 ).

variants.name: Joannah

In the New Testament, this name is borne by a woman who was one of Jesus's followers (Luke 8:3; 24:10). She was the wife of the steward of the household of King Herod Antipas. The name was regularly used throughout the Middle Ages in most parts of Europe as a feminine equivalent of John , but in England it has only been in common use as a vernacular given name since the 19th century. Celebrated British bearers of the name include the novelist Joanna Trollope ( b. 1943 ), the actress Joanna Lumley ( b. 1946 ), and the concert pianist Joanna McGregor ( b. 1959 ).

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Joanna Bagge was born about 1581, in Chard, Somerset, England, her father, Thomas Bagge, was 22 and her mother, Botilla Von Zijlen, was 21. She married Thomas Strong on 12 May 1603, in Chardstock, Devon, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 8 daughters. She died on 26 August 1657, in Chardstock, Dorset, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 77, and was buried in Chardstock, Dorset, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joanna Bagge est née environ 1581, à Chard, Somerset, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Bagge, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Botilla Von Zijlen, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Strong le 12 mai 1603, à Chardstock, Devon, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 8 filles. Elle est décédée le 26 août 1657, à Chardstock, Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 77 ans, et a été enterrée à Chardstock, Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joanna Bagge um 1581 in Chard, Somerset, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas Bagge 22 und ihre Mutter Botilla Von Zijlen 21. Sie hat am 12. Mai 1603 in Chardstock, Devon, England Thomas Strong geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 8 Töchter. Sie starb am 26. August 1657 im Alter von 77 Jahren in Chardstock, Dorset, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Chardstock, Dorset, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lei sposato Thomas Strong il 12 maggio 1603, nel Chardstock, Devon, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 8 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Joanna Baggeが約1581年にイギリスソメルセトチャードで生まれた時，父Thomas Baggeは22歳，母Botilla Von Zijlenは21歳であった。1603年5月12日にイギリスデボンチャードストックでThomas Strongと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と8人の娘の親であった。彼女は1657年8月26日にイギリスイギリスドールセトチャードストックで77歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスドールセトチャードストックにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Joanna Bagge(이)가 대략 1581년 영국 서머세트 처드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Bagge(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Botilla Von Zijlen(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1603년 5월 12일 영국 데폰 처스톡에서 Thomas Strong(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1657년 8월 26일 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트 처스톡에서 77세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트 처스톡에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joanna Bagge nasceu aproximadamente 1581, em Chard, Somerset, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Bagge, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Botilla Von Zijlen, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Strong em 12 de maio de 1603, em Chardstock, Devon, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 8 filhas. Ela faleceu em 26 de agosto de 1657, em Chardstock, Dorset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 77 anos, e foi sepultada em Chardstock, Dorset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joanna Bagge родилась около 1581 г. в местности чард, сомирсет, Англия, её отцу по имени Thomas Bagge было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Botilla Von Zijlen, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Strong 12 мая 1603 г. в местности чардстокк, девон, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 8 дочерей. Она умерла 26 августа 1657 г. в местности чардстокк, дорсет, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 77 лет и была похоронена в местности чардстокк, дорсет, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Thomas Strong el 12 de mayo de 1603, en Chardstock, Devon, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 8 hijas. Murió el 26 de agosto de 1657, en Chardstock, Dorset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 77 años, y fue sepultada en Chardstock, Dorset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
